nasb.text: But if on the bald head or the bald forehead, there occurs a reddish-white infection, it is leprosy breaking out on his bald head or on his bald forehead.

esv.text: But if there is on the bald head or the bald forehead a reddish-white diseased area, it is a leprous disease breaking out on his bald head or his bald forehead.

cnv.text: 但是頭頂禿處或是額前禿處，若有白中帶紅的病症，這就是痲風病，在他的頭頂禿處或是額前處發作。

ccb.text: 如果在光秃的头上或前额上长出白里带红的疮，那就是麻风病。
